# NEXO runtime core

This repository contains the local runtime core that powers NEXO Desktop.

NEXO Desktop is the public product, installer, update channel, onboarding
surface, settings UI, and support path. The local NEXO runtime provides memory,
automation, Deep Sleep, Skills, Watchdog, followups, diagnostics, and MCP
tooling inside the Desktop product.

Legacy `nexo-brain` package and binary names remain only for install/update
compatibility. They are not a separate product line.

## Public Product

- Website: https://nexo-desktop.com/
- Downloads and updates: https://nexo-desktop.com/downloads/
- Support path: NEXO Desktop

## Runtime Contract

- Public product: NEXO Desktop
- Runtime role: local NEXO core bundled with Desktop
- Active systems: local memory, Deep Sleep, Skills, Watchdog, followups,
  diagnostics, and MCP tooling
- Removed system: Evolution background self-improvement loop and its legacy
  tool surfaces

For product information, billing, support, and installers, use
https://nexo-desktop.com/.
